name: D&D 5e SRD — Rules
description: Catalogs (conditions, damage types, skills, sizes, spell-schools, etc.) plus feats and backgrounds. Prerequisite for the other SRD packages.

conditions.name: Blinded
conditions.body: {"description":"A Blinded creature can't see and auto-fails any ability check that requires sight. Attacks against it have Advantage, and its own attacks have Disadvantage.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","imposedAdvantageOnAttacksAgainst":true,"attacksHaveDisadvantage":true}]}

conditions.name: Charmed
conditions.body: {"description":"A Charmed creature can't attack the charmer or target the charmer with damaging abilities or magical effects. The charmer has Advantage on any ability check to interact socially with the creature."}

conditions.name: Deafened
conditions.body: {"description":"A Deafened creature can't hear and auto-fails any ability check that requires hearing."}

conditions.name: Exhaustion
conditions.body: {"description":"Exhaustion is tracked as a level from 1 to 6. While Exhausted, D20 Tests are reduced by 2 times the level, and Speed is reduced by 5 feet times the level. A creature at Exhaustion level 6 dies. A Long Rest reduces Exhaustion by 1 level. Exhaustion is cumulative: additional sources add to the level."}

conditions.name: Frightened
conditions.body: {"description":"A Frightened creature has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls while the source of its fear is within line of sight. It also can't willingly move closer to the source of its fear.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","attacksHaveDisadvantage":true}]}

conditions.name: Grappled
conditions.body: {"description":"A Grappled creature's Speed is 0 and can't benefit from any bonus to its Speed. The creature has Disadvantage on attack rolls against any target other than the grappler. The condition ends if the grappler is Incapacitated or if the creature is moved outside the grappler's reach.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","speedZero":true,"grappled":true}]}

conditions.name: Incapacitated
conditions.body: {"description":"An Incapacitated creature can't take any action, Bonus Action, or Reaction. Its concentration is broken. It can't speak. If the creature is Surprised, it has Disadvantage on Initiative rolls.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","incapacitated":true,"cannotTakeActions":true,"cannotTakeReactions":true}]}

conditions.name: Invisible
conditions.body: {"description":"While Invisible, a creature is Heavily Obscured for the purpose of being found by sight and is Concealed. Attack rolls against it have Disadvantage, and its own attack rolls have Advantage. The creature has Advantage on Initiative rolls.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","invisibleToSight":true}]}

conditions.name: Paralyzed
conditions.body: {"description":"A Paralyzed creature is Incapacitated, its Speed is 0, and it auto-fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws. Attacks against the creature have Advantage, and any attack that hits from within 5 feet is a critical hit.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","incapacitated":true,"speedZero":true,"autoFailSavesOf":["dexterity","strength"],"imposedAdvantageOnAttacksAgainst":true,"cannotTakeActions":true,"cannotTakeReactions":true}]}

conditions.name: Petrified
conditions.body: {"description":"A Petrified creature is transformed, along with any object it's wearing or carrying, into a solid inanimate substance (usually stone). Its weight increases by a factor of 10, and it ceases aging. The creature is Incapacitated, its Speed is 0, and it is unaware of its surroundings. Attacks against it have Advantage. It auto-fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws. It has Resistance to all damage and Immunity to the Poisoned condition.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","incapacitated":true,"speedZero":true,"autoFailSavesOf":["dexterity","strength"],"imposedAdvantageOnAttacksAgainst":true,"cannotTakeActions":true,"cannotTakeReactions":true}]}

conditions.name: Poisoned
conditions.body: {"description":"A Poisoned creature has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","attacksHaveDisadvantage":true}]}

conditions.name: Prone
conditions.body: {"description":"A Prone creature's only movement options are to crawl or to spend half its Speed to stand up (ending the condition). The creature has Disadvantage on attack rolls. Attack rolls against the creature have Advantage if the attacker is within 5 feet; otherwise they have Disadvantage.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","attacksHaveDisadvantage":true}]}

conditions.name: Restrained
conditions.body: {"description":"A Restrained creature's Speed is 0 and can't benefit from any bonus to its Speed. Attacks against it have Advantage, and its own attacks have Disadvantage. It has Disadvantage on Dexterity saving throws.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","speedZero":true,"imposedAdvantageOnAttacksAgainst":true,"attacksHaveDisadvantage":true},{"t":"modifySave","ability":"dexterity","advantage":"disadvantage"}]}

conditions.name: Stunned
conditions.body: {"description":"A Stunned creature is Incapacitated, can't move, and can speak only falteringly. It auto-fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws. Attacks against it have Advantage.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","incapacitated":true,"speedZero":true,"autoFailSavesOf":["dexterity","strength"],"imposedAdvantageOnAttacksAgainst":true,"cannotTakeActions":true,"cannotTakeReactions":true}]}

conditions.name: Unconscious
conditions.body: {"description":"An Unconscious creature is Incapacitated, can't move or speak, and is unaware of its surroundings. It drops whatever it's holding and falls Prone. Its Speed is 0. Attacks against it have Advantage. It auto-fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws. Any attack that hits from within 5 feet is a critical hit.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","incapacitated":true,"speedZero":true,"autoFailSavesOf":["dexterity","strength"],"imposedAdvantageOnAttacksAgainst":true,"cannotTakeActions":true,"cannotTakeReactions":true}]}

weaponProperties.name: Ammunition
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["ammunition"],"description":"You can use a weapon that has the Ammunition property to make a ranged attack only if you have ammunition to fire from it. You must draw the ammunition as part of the attack. You can recover half your expended ammunition by taking 1 minute to search the battlefield after combat."}

weaponProperties.name: Finesse
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["finesse"],"description":"When making an attack with a Finesse weapon, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modifier for the attack and damage rolls. You must use the same modifier for both rolls."}

weaponProperties.name: Heavy
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["heavy"],"description":"Small or Tiny creatures have Disadvantage on attack rolls with Heavy weapons. A Heavy weapon's size and bulk make it too large for them to use effectively."}

weaponProperties.name: Light
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["light"],"description":"A Light weapon is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when fighting with two weapons."}

weaponProperties.name: Loading
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["loading"],"description":"You can fire only one piece of ammunition from a Loading weapon when you use an action, Bonus Action, or Reaction to fire it, regardless of the number of attacks you can normally make."}

weaponProperties.name: Range
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["range"],"description":"A Range weapon has a normal and long range in feet. Attack rolls beyond the normal range have Disadvantage, and you can't attack a target beyond the long range."}

weaponProperties.name: Reach
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["reach"],"description":"A Reach weapon adds 5 feet to your reach when you attack with it, as well as when determining your reach for Opportunity Attacks with it."}

weaponProperties.name: Thrown
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["thrown"],"description":"If a weapon has the Thrown property, you can throw it to make a ranged attack. If it is a melee weapon, you use the same ability modifier for the attack and damage rolls that you would use for a melee attack with it. For example, if you throw a Handaxe, you use Strength; if you throw a Dagger, you can use Strength or Dexterity because the weapon also has the Finesse property."}

weaponProperties.name: Two-Handed
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["twoHanded"],"description":"A Two-Handed weapon requires two hands when you attack with it."}

weaponProperties.name: Versatile
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["versatile"],"description":"A Versatile weapon can be used with one or two hands. A damage value in parentheses appears with the property — the damage when the weapon is used with two hands to make a melee attack."}

weaponMasteries.name: Cleave
weaponMasteries.body: {"description":"On a melee hit, you can make one extra attack roll against a different creature within 5 feet of the original target. Damage is the weapon's damage without the ability modifier."}

weaponMasteries.name: Graze
weaponMasteries.body: {"description":"On a melee miss, the target takes damage equal to the ability modifier used for the attack roll. Damage is the same type as the weapon's."}

weaponMasteries.name: Nick
weaponMasteries.body: {"description":"When you make the extra attack of the Light property with this weapon, you can make it as part of the Attack action instead of as a Bonus Action."}

weaponMasteries.name: Push
weaponMasteries.body: {"description":"On a hit, you can push the target up to 10 feet straight away from you if it is Large or smaller."}

weaponMasteries.name: Sap
weaponMasteries.body: {"description":"On a hit, the target has Disadvantage on its next attack roll before the start of your next turn."}

weaponMasteries.name: Slow
weaponMasteries.body: {"description":"On a hit, the target's Speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of your next turn. The effect doesn't stack with itself."}

weaponMasteries.name: Topple
weaponMasteries.body: {"description":"On a hit, the target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw (DC 8 + your ability modifier + your Proficiency Bonus) or have the Prone condition."}

weaponMasteries.name: Vex
weaponMasteries.body: {"description":"On a hit, you have Advantage on your next attack roll against the target before the end of your next turn."}

feats.name: Alert
feats.body: {"category":"origin","description":"You are always on the lookout for danger. You gain the following benefits. Initiative Proficiency: When you roll Initiative, you can add your Proficiency Bonus to the roll. Initiative Swap: Immediately after you roll Initiative, you can swap your Initiative with the Initiative of one willing ally in the same combat. You can't make this swap if you or the ally has the Incapacitated condition."}

feats.name: Crafter
feats.body: {"category":"origin","description":"You are adept at crafting things and bartering with merchants. You gain the following benefits. Tool Proficiency: You gain proficiency with three different Artisan's Tools of your choice from the Fast Crafting table. Discount: Whenever you buy a nonmagical item, you get a 20 percent discount on it. Fast Crafting: When you finish a Long Rest, you can craft one piece of gear from the Fast Crafting table, provided you have the Artisan's Tools associated with that item and have proficiency with those tools."}

feats.name: Healer
feats.body: {"category":"origin","description":"You are an able physician, allowing you to mend wounds quickly and get your allies back in the fight. You gain the following benefits. Battle Medic: If you have a Healer's Kit, you can use it to restore Hit Points to a creature as a Utilize action. The creature regains a number of Hit Points equal to 1d6 plus your Proficiency Bonus, provided that the creature has at least 1 Hit Point and isn't at its Hit Point maximum. Healing Rerolls: Whenever you roll a die to determine the number of Hit Points you restore with a spell or with this feat's Battle Medic benefit, you can reroll the die if it rolls a 1, and you must use the new roll."}

feats.name: Lucky
feats.body: {"category":"origin","description":"You have inexplicable luck that can kick in at just the right moment. You have a number of Luck Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus and can spend the points on the following benefits. You regain your expended Luck Points when you finish a Long Rest. Advantage: When you roll a d20 for a D20 Test, you can spend 1 Luck Point to give yourself Advantage on the roll. Disadvantage: When a creature rolls a d20 for an attack roll against you, you can spend 1 Luck Point to impose Disadvantage on that roll."}

feats.name: Magic Initiate (Cleric)
feats.body: {"category":"origin","repeatable":true,"description":"You have learned the rudiments of the Cleric spell list. You gain the following benefits. Two Cantrips: You learn two cantrips of your choice from the Cleric spell list. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for this feat's spells. Level 1 Spell: Choose a level 1 spell from the Cleric spell list. You always have that spell prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in that way when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast the spell using any spell slots you have. Spell Change: Whenever you gain a new level, you can replace one of the spells you chose for this feat with another spell of the same level from the Cleric spell list. Repeatable: You can take this feat more than once, but you must choose a different spell list each time."}

feats.name: Magic Initiate (Druid)
feats.body: {"category":"origin","repeatable":true,"description":"You have learned the rudiments of the Druid spell list. You gain the following benefits. Two Cantrips: You learn two cantrips of your choice from the Druid spell list. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for this feat's spells. Level 1 Spell: Choose a level 1 spell from the Druid spell list. You always have that spell prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in that way when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast the spell using any spell slots you have. Spell Change: Whenever you gain a new level, you can replace one of the spells you chose for this feat with another spell of the same level from the Druid spell list. Repeatable: You can take this feat more than once, but you must choose a different spell list each time."}

feats.name: Magic Initiate (Wizard)
feats.body: {"category":"origin","repeatable":true,"description":"You have learned the rudiments of the Wizard spell list. You gain the following benefits. Two Cantrips: You learn two cantrips of your choice from the Wizard spell list. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for this feat's spells. Level 1 Spell: Choose a level 1 spell from the Wizard spell list. You always have that spell prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in that way when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast the spell using any spell slots you have. Spell Change: Whenever you gain a new level, you can replace one of the spells you chose for this feat with another spell of the same level from the Wizard spell list. Repeatable: You can take this feat more than once, but you must choose a different spell list each time."}

feats.name: Musician
feats.body: {"category":"origin","description":"You are adept at playing music. You gain the following benefits. Instrument Training: You gain proficiency with three Musical Instruments of your choice. Encouraging Song: As you finish a Short Rest or Long Rest, you can play a song on a Musical Instrument with which you have proficiency and give Heroic Inspiration to allies who hear the song. The number of allies you can affect in this way equals your Proficiency Bonus."}

feats.name: Savage Attacker
feats.body: {"category":"origin","description":"You've trained to deal particularly damaging strikes. Once per turn when you hit a target with a weapon, you can roll the weapon's damage dice twice and use either roll against the target."}

feats.name: Skilled
feats.body: {"category":"origin","repeatable":true,"description":"You have exceptionally broad learning. You gain proficiency in any combination of three skills or tools of your choice. Repeatable: You can take this feat more than once."}

feats.name: Tavern Brawler
feats.body: {"category":"origin","description":"Accustomed to brawling, you gain the following benefits. Enhanced Unarmed Strike: When you hit with your Unarmed Strike and deal damage, you can deal Bludgeoning damage equal to 1d4 plus your Strength modifier instead of the normal damage of an Unarmed Strike. Damage Rerolls: Whenever you roll a damage die for your Unarmed Strike, you can reroll the die if it rolls a 1, and you must use the new roll. Improvised Weaponry: You have proficiency with improvised weapons. Push: When you hit a creature with an Unarmed Strike as part of the Attack action on your turn, you can deal damage to the target and also push it 5 feet away from you. You can use this benefit only once per turn."}

feats.name: Tough
feats.body: {"category":"origin","description":"Your Hit Point maximum increases by an amount equal to twice your character level when you gain this feat. Whenever you gain a character level thereafter, your Hit Point maximum increases by an additional 2 Hit Points."}

feats.name: Mobile
feats.body: {"category":"general","prerequisite":"Level 4+","description":"Speed increases by 10 feet. Dash through difficult terrain doesn't cost extra movement. After making a melee attack against a creature this turn, you don't provoke opportunity attacks from that creature."}

feats.name: Sentinel
feats.body: {"category":"general","prerequisite":"Level 4+","description":"Opportunity attack reduces the creature's speed to 0. Creatures provoke opportunity attacks even with Disengage. When a creature within 5 feet attacks a target other than you, you can use a reaction to make a melee attack."}

feats.name: Skill Expert
feats.body: {"category":"general","repeatable":true,"prerequisite":"Level 4+","description":"Increase one ability score by 1 (max 20). Gain proficiency in one skill. Choose one skill you're proficient in to gain Expertise."}

feats.name: Defense
feats.body: {"category":"fightingStyle","prerequisite":"Fighting Style feature","description":"While you wear armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC."}

feats.name: Dueling
feats.body: {"category":"fightingStyle","prerequisite":"Fighting Style feature","description":"When you are wielding a melee weapon in one hand and no other weapons, you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls with that weapon."}

feats.name: Great Weapon Fighting
feats.body: {"category":"fightingStyle","prerequisite":"Fighting Style feature","description":"When you roll a 1 or 2 on a damage die for a melee weapon you wield with two hands, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll. The weapon must have the Two-Handed or Versatile property."}

feats.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
feats.body: {"category":"fightingStyle","prerequisite":"Fighting Style feature","description":"When you make an extra attack as part of the Light weapon mastery, you can add your ability modifier to that attack's damage."}

feats.name: Boon of Combat Prowess
feats.body: {"category":"epicBoon","prerequisite":"Level 19+","description":"Increase one ability score by 1 (max 30). Once on each of your turns when you miss with an attack roll, you can hit instead."}

feats.name: Boon of Dimensional Travel
feats.body: {"category":"epicBoon","prerequisite":"Level 19+","description":"Increase one ability score by 1 (max 30). As a bonus action, teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see."}

feats.name: Boon of Skill
feats.body: {"category":"epicBoon","prerequisite":"Level 19+","description":"Increase one ability score by 1 (max 30). Gain proficiency in all skills."}

backgrounds.name: Acolyte
backgrounds.body: {"effects":[{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:insight"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:religion"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"tool","targetId":"srd:calligraphers_supplies"}],"description":"You devoted yourself to service in a temple. Ability Scores: Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma. Origin Feat: Magic Initiate (Cleric). Skill Proficiencies: Insight, Religion. Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies. Starting Equipment: Calligrapher's Supplies, a Holy Symbol, a Prayer Book, 5 sheets of Parchment, a set of Common Clothes, and a Pouch containing 8 GP."}

backgrounds.name: Artisan
backgrounds.body: {"effects":[{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:investigation"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:persuasion"}],"description":"You apprenticed to a master crafter. Ability Scores: Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence. Origin Feat: Crafter. Skill Proficiencies: Investigation, Persuasion. Tool Proficiency: one set of Artisan's Tools of your choice (chosen at character creation; grants a tool proficiency effect dynamically). Starting Equipment: 2 Pouches, Traveler's Clothes, one set of Artisan's Tools, and 32 GP."}

backgrounds.name: Charlatan
backgrounds.body: {"effects":[{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:deception"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:sleight_of_hand"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"tool","targetId":"srd:forgery_kit"}],"description":"You made your way by grift and misdirection. Ability Scores: Dexterity, Constitution, Charisma. Origin Feat: Skilled. Skill Proficiencies: Deception, Sleight of Hand. Tool Proficiency: Forgery Kit. Starting Equipment: Fine Clothes, a Forgery Kit, Costume, and 15 GP."}

backgrounds.name: Criminal
backgrounds.body: {"effects":[{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:sleight_of_hand"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:stealth"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"tool","targetId":"srd:thieves_tools"}],"description":"You lived by breaking the law. Ability Scores: Dexterity, Constitution, Intelligence. Origin Feat: Alert. Skill Proficiencies: Sleight of Hand, Stealth. Tool Proficiency: Thieves' Tools. Starting Equipment: 2 Daggers, Thieves' Tools, a Crowbar, 2 Pouches, Traveler's Clothes, and 16 GP."}

backgrounds.name: Entertainer
backgrounds.body: {"effects":[{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:acrobatics"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:performance"}],"description":"You thrived on the applause of a crowd. Ability Scores: Strength, Dexterity, Charisma. Origin Feat: Musician. Skill Proficiencies: Acrobatics, Performance. Tool Proficiency: one Musical Instrument of your choice. Starting Equipment: Traveler's Clothes, one Musical Instrument, a Costume, and 11 GP."}

backgrounds.name: Farmer
backgrounds.body: {"effects":[{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:animal_handling"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:nature"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"tool","targetId":"srd:carpenters_tools"}],"description":"You worked the land and learned patience. Ability Scores: Strength, Constitution, Wisdom. Origin Feat: Tough. Skill Proficiencies: Animal Handling, Nature. Tool Proficiency: Carpenter's Tools. Starting Equipment: Carpenter's Tools, a Shovel, an Iron Pot, Traveler's Clothes, and 30 GP."}

backgrounds.name: Guard
backgrounds.body: {"effects":[{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:athletics"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:perception"}],"description":"You stood watch over a settlement. Ability Scores: Strength, Intelligence, Wisdom. Origin Feat: Alert. Skill Proficiencies: Athletics, Perception. Tool Proficiency: one Gaming Set of your choice. Starting Equipment: a Spear, a Light Crossbow with 20 Bolts, a Gaming Set, a Hooded Lantern, Traveler's Clothes, and 12 GP."}

backgrounds.name: Guide
backgrounds.body: {"effects":[{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:stealth"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:survival"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"tool","targetId":"srd:cartographers_tools"}],"description":"You grew up in the wilds far from civilization. Ability Scores: Dexterity, Constitution, Wisdom. Origin Feat: Magic Initiate (Druid). Skill Proficiencies: Stealth, Survival. Tool Proficiency: Cartographer's Tools. Starting Equipment: a Shortbow with 20 Arrows, Cartographer's Tools, Traveler's Clothes, a Tent, and 3 GP."}

backgrounds.name: Hermit
backgrounds.body: {"effects":[{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:medicine"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:religion"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"tool","targetId":"srd:herbalism_kit"}],"description":"You lived in seclusion, seeking insight. Ability Scores: Constitution, Wisdom, Charisma. Origin Feat: Healer. Skill Proficiencies: Medicine, Religion. Tool Proficiency: Herbalism Kit. Starting Equipment: a Quarterstaff, a Herbalism Kit, Traveler's Clothes, 2 Pouches, and 16 GP."}

backgrounds.name: Merchant
backgrounds.body: {"effects":[{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:animal_handling"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:persuasion"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"tool","targetId":"srd:navigators_tools"}],"description":"You hauled goods between markets. Ability Scores: Constitution, Intelligence, Charisma. Origin Feat: Lucky. Skill Proficiencies: Animal Handling, Persuasion. Tool Proficiency: Navigator's Tools. Starting Equipment: Navigator's Tools, 2 Pouches, Traveler's Clothes, and 22 GP."}

backgrounds.name: Noble
backgrounds.body: {"effects":[{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:history"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:persuasion"}],"description":"You were born to privilege and rank. Ability Scores: Strength, Intelligence, Charisma. Origin Feat: Skilled. Skill Proficiencies: History, Persuasion. Tool Proficiency: one Gaming Set of your choice. Starting Equipment: a Gaming Set, Fine Clothes, a Perfume, and 29 GP."}

backgrounds.name: Sage
backgrounds.body: {"effects":[{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:arcana"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:history"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"tool","targetId":"srd:calligraphers_supplies"}],"description":"You devoted yourself to study and research. Ability Scores: Constitution, Intelligence, Wisdom. Origin Feat: Magic Initiate (Wizard). Skill Proficiencies: Arcana, History. Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies. Starting Equipment: a Quarterstaff, Calligrapher's Supplies, a Book of Lore, Robes, a Parchment, a Bottle of Ink, and 8 GP."}

backgrounds.name: Sailor
backgrounds.body: {"effects":[{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:acrobatics"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:perception"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"tool","targetId":"srd:navigators_tools"}],"description":"You shipped out to learn the sea. Ability Scores: Strength, Dexterity, Wisdom. Origin Feat: Tavern Brawler. Skill Proficiencies: Acrobatics, Perception. Tool Proficiency: Navigator's Tools. Starting Equipment: a Dagger, Navigator's Tools, a Rope, Traveler's Clothes, and 20 GP."}

backgrounds.name: Scribe
backgrounds.body: {"effects":[{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:investigation"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:perception"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"tool","targetId":"srd:calligraphers_supplies"}],"description":"You trained to transcribe and illuminate texts. Ability Scores: Dexterity, Intelligence, Wisdom. Origin Feat: Skilled. Skill Proficiencies: Investigation, Perception. Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies. Starting Equipment: Calligrapher's Supplies, a Fine Clothes, a Lamp, 2 Flasks of Oil, 5 sheets of Parchment, and 23 GP."}

backgrounds.name: Soldier
backgrounds.body: {"effects":[{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:athletics"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:intimidation"}],"description":"You trained in a martial company. Ability Scores: Strength, Dexterity, Constitution. Origin Feat: Savage Attacker. Skill Proficiencies: Athletics, Intimidation. Tool Proficiency: one Gaming Set of your choice. Starting Equipment: a Spear, a Shortbow with 20 Arrows, a Gaming Set, a Healer's Kit, Traveler's Clothes, and 14 GP."}

backgrounds.name: Wayfarer
backgrounds.body: {"effects":[{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:insight"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"skill","targetId":"srd:stealth"},{"t":"grantProficiency","kind":"tool","targetId":"srd:thieves_tools"}],"description":"You grew up on the streets, always moving. Ability Scores: Dexterity, Wisdom, Charisma. Origin Feat: Lucky. Skill Proficiencies: Insight, Stealth. Tool Proficiency: Thieves' Tools. Starting Equipment: 2 Daggers, Thieves' Tools, a Gaming Set, 2 Pouches, Traveler's Clothes, and 16 GP."}
